📜 Adventurer's Tale

Greetings, traveler! I am Duc, a wandering Full-Stack Developer who has ventured through the vast realms of code since the ancient times.

My quest began in the Kingdom of Computer Science, where I forged my first weapons — HTML shields and CSS armor. Over the years, I mastered the arcane arts of JavaScript sorcery and conquered the dungeons of Backend engineering.

Today, I seek new adventures and worthy allies. Whether it be building enchanted web applications, slaying bugs in the darkest codebases, or crafting pixel-perfect interfaces — I am ready for the challenge!

💾 SYSTEM MEMORY

AUTO-SAVE

📋 Quest Board

✅ E-Commerce Kingdom

Built a full-stack e-commerce platform with payment integration, inventory management, and real-time order tracking.

COMPLETED ▶ Demo ⌂ Github
✅ Dashboard Fortress

Designed and developed an analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, user management, and role-based access.

COMPLETED ▶ Demo ⌂ Github
⚡ AI Dragon Slayer

Currently building an AI-powered application that helps adventurers (users) navigate complex data landscapes with intelligent search.

IN PROGRESS

📖 Adventure Log

2024 — Present

Senior Developer — Tech Guild

Leading a party of developers on epic quests. Architecting large-scale web applications and mentoring junior adventurers.

2021 — 2024

Full-Stack Developer — Digital Realm

Crafted numerous web applications using React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. Defeated many production bugs.

2017 — 2021

Bachelor of Computer Science — The Academy

Studied the ancient arts of algorithms, data structures, and software engineering. Graduated with honors.
